reservations.title: Reservation settings
reservations.subtitle: Manage booking rules, team availability, and exceptions.

owner_only.notice: Owner-only solo mode keeps only global reservation settings and waitlist-ready resources. Staff schedules, staff overrides, and hybrid queue stay disabled until team members are enabled.

company_rules.title: Company booking rules
company_rules.description: Default rules applied to all team members.

team_settings.title: Team member overrides
team_settings.description: Optional overrides for specific team members.

weekly.title: Weekly availability
weekly.description: Define recurring opening hours per team member.

exceptions.title: Availability exceptions
exceptions.description: Set one-time closures or special openings.

resources.title: Resources and capacity
resources.description: Define optional resources used to enforce slot capacity.

notifications.title: Reservation notifications
notifications.description: Configure emails, in-app alerts, reminders, and review requests.

fields.notify_on_review_submitted: Notify when a review is submitted
fields.review_request_on_completed: Ask client for review after completion
fields.notify_on_queue_ticket_created: Send SMS when queue ticket is created
fields.notify_on_queue_eta_10m: Send alert around 10 minutes before turn

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Manage two-factor authentication and account activity.

two_factor.title: Two-factor authentication
two_factor.description: Adds an extra email code at login.
two_factor.app_setup_hint: Scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app, then confirm the 6-digit code.
two_factor.sms_disabled_company: SMS 2FA must be enabled in company settings.
two_factor.sms_missing_phone: Add a phone number to your profile to enable SMS 2FA.

password.title: Password
password.description: Change your password from your profile page.

rate_limit.title: API protection
rate_limit.description: Rate limiting protects your API and automation.

store.title: Storefront settings
store.description: Customize your public store header and featured product.
store.hero_images_hint: Paste one image URL per line. These will rotate behind the featured product.
store.hero_images_upload_hint: Select high-resolution images (min. 1280x720) to avoid pixelation.
store.ai_images_modal_hint: Mention the product, mood, background, and style.
store.ai_images_prompt_required: Add a short description to generate the image.
store.ai_images_limit_reached: Daily AI image limit reached. Buy an AI pack in Billing to generate more.
store.ai_images_disabled: AI image generation is disabled. Add an AI pack in Billing or configure your AI key.
store.ai_images_error: Unable to generate the AI image.
store.hero_captions_hint: Add a caption per slide. Leave empty to use the global hero text.
store.hero_copy_placeholder: Write the hero text block here...

delivery.title: Delivery & pickup
delivery.description: Configure delivery and pickup options for customers.

notifications.title: Company alerts
notifications.description: Choose the preferred method and allowed channels for each alert type.
notifications.preferred_description: This preference is used as the default channel when a new alert is added.
notifications.matrix_description: Enable Email, SMS, or WhatsApp depending on the alert type the company wants to send.
notifications.delivery_hint: SMS and WhatsApp are used only when the provider is configured and a phone number is available.

channel_descriptions.email: Best for complete details and links.
channel_descriptions.sms: Short and direct for urgent reminders.
channel_descriptions.whatsapp: Useful for clients who respond through messaging.

task_day.label: Today visits
task_day.description: Reminder sent to the client on the day of the task or service visit.

task_updates.label: Rescheduled or cancelled tasks
task_updates.description: Notifies the client when a task is rescheduled, cancelled, or overdue.

reservations.label: Reservations
reservations.description: Creation, reminders, rescheduling, cancellations, and reservation reviews.

orders.label: Orders
orders.description: New orders, status changes, and client actions.

sales.label: Sales
sales.description: New sales, commercial follow-ups, and important results.

stock.label: Stock
stock.description: Low stock alerts and important inventory movements.

planning.label: Planning
planning.description: Agenda reminders, shift changes, and attendance alerts.

billing.label: Invoices and payments
billing.description: Invoices, payments, approvals, and billing reminders.

expenses.label: Expenses
expenses.description: Expenses to approve, rejections, reimbursements, and petty cash.

crm.label: CRM and prospects
crm.description: Unassigned leads, prospects to follow up, and client actions.

support.label: Support
support.description: Client requests, inbound messages, and service follow-ups.

security.label: Security
security.description: Login, verification, and sensitive account alerts.

emails_mirror.label: Email copies
emails_mirror.description: Internal copies of important emails sent by the platform.

system.label: System
system.description: General information, usage limits, and useful technical alerts.

notifications.two_factor_sms_hint: If enabled, the account owner can choose SMS as the 2FA method in Security.

finance.title: Finance approvals
finance.description: Configure who can approve expenses and invoices on team plans, with amount thresholds per role.
finance.threshold_help: Leave the escalation role empty if the owner should handle anything above the base threshold.
finance.owner_fallback: The owner always remains the final fallback approver with no amount limit.

optional.invoice_auto_approve_under_amount_hint: Leave this empty to keep approval required on every employee-created invoice.

templates.title: Invoice template
templates.description: Choose the PDF invoice model your clients receive by default.

modern.title: Modern premium
modern.description: Balanced layout with a premium summary block, stronger hierarchy, and a polished client-facing finish.

clean_professional.title: Clean professional
clean_professional.description: A cleaner business invoice inspired by classic agency templates, with a lighter structure and a more formal feel.

minimal_corporate.title: Minimal corporate
minimal_corporate.description: A minimalist corporate invoice inspired by a black-and-white Canva layout, adapted with Malikia Pro accents for a sharper finish.

mode.solo: Current plan mode: Solo. New finance records are auto-approved immediately.
mode.team: Current plan mode: Team. Submitters are isolated from approval actions and thresholds apply.

presence.title: Attendance & presence
presence.description: Configure auto clock-in/out and manual time tracking.
presence.manual_hint: Employees can clock in/out from the Presence page.

categories.title: Service / product categories
categories.description: Add categories to organize services and products.

api.title: API access
api.description: Generate public or private tokens to connect external tools.
api.token_hint: Copy this token now; it will not be shown again.

warehouses.title: Warehouses
warehouses.description: Manage stock locations and choose a default warehouse.

suppliers.title: Suppliers (Canada)
suppliers.description: Choose active platforms and up to {limit} preferred suppliers.
suppliers.enable_hint: Enable this supplier to recommend it.
suppliers.add_description: Add a supplier with a link to include it in searches.

limits.title: Plan limits
limits.alert: Some limits are close or exceeded. Consider upgrading your plan.

defaults.title: Global default
defaults.description: Used when no template exists for a position.

errors.paddle_not_ready: Paddle.js is not ready. Refresh the page.
errors.payment_update_failed: Unable to start the payment update.
errors.paddle_load_failed: Unable to load Paddle.js. Check your connection.
errors.paddle_unavailable: Paddle.js is loaded but unavailable. Refresh the page.
errors.paddle_api_missing: Paddle API not configured. Add `PADDLE_API_KEY` to `.env`.
errors.no_plans_configured: No plans configured. Add your PRICE_ID in the environment.
errors.provider_not_supported: Billing provider is set to {provider}. Paddle actions are disabled.
errors.stripe_not_configured: Stripe is not configured. Check STRIPE_SECRET, STRIPE_PRICE_* and STRIPE_ENABLED=true.
errors.stripe_portal_failed: Unable to open Stripe customer portal.
errors.plan_change_failed: Unable to change plans right now.

plans.title: Platform subscription
plans.subtitle: Review your active plan, adjust your subscription, and manage related AI usage.
plans.catalog_subtitle_solo: Same operating core for independent work, with room to move into Team later.
plans.catalog_subtitle_team: Same operating core with collaboration, permissions, and higher limits for shared execution.

advisor.title: Change plan
advisor.subtitle: Answer a few quick questions and we will surface the plans that best fit your current operating needs.
advisor.current_match: Your current plan already fits these answers well.

questions.business: What does your organization look like today?
questions.focus: What do you need most right now?
questions.ai: How important should AI be in the package?

solo.label: Solo
solo.description: I work alone and want a plan designed for an independent operator.

small_team.label: Small team
small_team.description: We are a small crew and mainly need lightweight coordination.

growing_team.label: Growing team
growing_team.description: We already have a real team and need more structure for operations.

large_team.label: Structured team
large_team.description: We handle a larger volume and need more coordination and support.

custom_scale.label: Custom scale
custom_scale.description: We have 50+ users or need a more tailored rollout and support model.

quotes.label: Quotes and invoices
quotes.description: I mainly want speed on quotes, invoicing, and client follow-up.

operations.label: Field operations
operations.description: I want stronger jobs, tasks, scheduling, and day-to-day coordination.

automation.label: Automation and AI
automation.description: I am looking for more automation, performance tooling, scan, and AI.

light.label: Light usage
light.description: I only need occasional AI help and a few scans each month.

regular.label: Regular usage
regular.description: I want AI to support day-to-day execution without going into the highest volumes.

advanced.label: Advanced usage
advanced.description: I expect heavier AI, scan, and automation usage as part of the plan.

reasons.small_team: Good match for a small team.
reasons.large_team: Better suited to a larger operation.
reasons.custom_scale: Better suited to a tailored deployment.
reasons.room_to_grow: Leaves room to grow without changing too quickly.
reasons.quotes: Keeps the experience simple for quotes and invoicing.
reasons.operations: Strengthens jobs, tasks, and scheduling day to day.
reasons.automation: Unlocks more automation, performance tools, and advanced workflows.
reasons.ai_light: Keeps AI access light and easy to control.
reasons.ai_growth: Provides more AI and scan capacity for regular use.
reasons.ai_advanced: Includes higher AI and scan headroom for advanced usage.
reasons.custom_support: Allows for more tailored rollout, support, and commercial framing.

checkout.cancelled: Payment canceled. Choose a plan to continue.

summary.no_subscription: No active subscription. Select a plan to get started.

assistant_addon.title: AI assistant
assistant_addon.subtitle: Manage the AI assistant and pay only for additional usage.
assistant_addon.subtitle_credit: Manage the AI assistant and buy credit packs when needed.
assistant_addon.credit_enable_required: Enable the AI option to buy credits.
assistant_addon.not_available: AI add-on unavailable. Configure Stripe and the usage or credit price.

payment.title: Payment method
payment.subtitle: Manage the card linked to your subscription.
payment.summary_none: No active subscription at the moment.

payment_methods.title: Accepted payment methods
payment_methods.subtitle: Choose which methods clients can use for this business.
payment_methods.default_hint_single: Only one method is enabled, so this method is used automatically.
payment_methods.default_hint_multi: When no method is pre-selected, this default is used.
payment_methods.cash_context_subtitle: Restrict where cash can be selected when cash is enabled.

cash.label: Cash
cash.description: Collected in person and marked as pending until received.

card.label: Card (Stripe)
card.description: Online card payment processed through Stripe.

bank_transfer.label: Bank transfer
bank_transfer.description: Manual transfer outside of card checkout.

tips.title: Tips settings
tips.subtitle: Configure limits, split strategy, and partial refund behavior.

loyalty.title: Loyalty settings
loyalty.subtitle: Configure points earning and redemption for POS sales.

connect.title: Stripe Connect
connect.subtitle: Connect your bank account to receive client payments directly.
connect.action_required_hint_generic: Some details are missing on Stripe.
connect.error_start: Unable to start Stripe Connect onboarding.

loyalty.title: Loyalty module configuration
loyalty.subtitle: Configure point earning rules, redemption, and labels.

fields.minimum_spend: Minimum spend before points are earned ($)
